data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the persona views corporate vs local reporting split. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete details about the API endpoints or functionality that would allow for this validation. The linked use cases and prior steps do not confirm the existence of the necessary reporting features or their outcomes, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the expected result.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoint or functionality for viewing corporate vs local reporting split.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the reporting functionality.
